message:
style(ndarray,ufunc): apply rustfmt to long lines in tests and integer-sidecar itemset

- fnp-ndarray: reflow `assert!(matches!(...))` in zero-element reshape test
- fnp-ufunc: reflow `ensure_exact_integer_bridge_value_supported` calls in
  shared-view itemset (I64 and U64 branches), and reflow multi-line
  `expect_err` chains in place, put, and fill_diagonal rejection tests
- fnp-ufunc: break long `from_storage` initializer in fill_diagonal test

No logic changes; formatting only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
